headline: Union Pacific Merger Talk Sparks Agricultural Shipper Concerns And Regulatory Focus
summary: Union Pacific (NYSE:UNP) and Norfolk Southern are the focus of new concerns around a potential merger and its impact on U.S. agricultural shippers. Major farm and grain trade groups are warning that the deal could lead to higher freight rates, weaker rail competition, and pressure on supply chain reliability. The issue is attracting attention because agricultural inputs and crop shipments rely heavily on rail, so any changes in pricing power or service terms could affect costs across the...
